title: Party Trick
description: A Trickster addon that adds new silly tricks. Including changing the color of blocks and items
body:
# Party Tricks
Adds random fun features to [Trickster](https://modrinth.com/mod/trickster) with a focus on decoration, minigames, and silliness while still being useful in other usecases!
### New Tricks:
- Getting the sound a player is listening to
- Playing and muffeling sounds for given players
- Getting, setting, and removing the color of a block, item, and entity
- Getting, setting, and removing the dye color of dyeable items
- Making an entity glow for given players
- Getting, mounting, and dismounting an entity from a vehicle
- Getting, and offsetting the breeding age of an animal
- Armor stand manipluation 
- A llama spit summoning ploy
- Setting custom model data on an item

### Other Features:
- New Triggers for placing a block, projectiles landing, fishing, and eating food
- A new item food item that can always be consumed
- More variants of magical items (using custom model data)

## How to use
You can find all info in the new entries within the Tome of Tomfoolery!

## Sumbitting your own variants
If you want to submit your own variant of a magical item feel free to contact me
